reviews.comment:
Mala atencion, lentos, siempre cola y en temporada generan un desastre de transito en el acceso (colas sobre la banquina en contramano. autos que se cruzan, bocinazos, etc). Ya hubo accidentes pero sigue todo igual o peor. La política de seguridad vial del ACA te la debo, en esta EESS no existe.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, slow, always in line, and during peak season they create a traffic nightmare on the access road (lines on the shoulder going the wrong way, cars cutting each other off, honking, etc.). There have already been accidents, but everything remains the same or worse. The ACA's road safety policy is nonexistent at this service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfMFpTN2tnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención del servicompras es un desastre. Pésima atención hoy Sábado 11/01/25. Pongan gente con ganas de trabajar

(Translated by Google)
The customer service at the shopping center is a disaster. Terrible service today, Saturday, January 11, 2025. They need to hire people who want to work.

reviews.comment:
No es mala estación de servicio, pero 20 años despues aun siguen haciendo entrar a los autos en contramano, haciendo que en horas pico los autos esperen en contramano sobre la ruta. Y sumale que un servicio esencial y de seguridad, como dar aire para neumáticos, te lo cobren! Una lastima.

(Translated by Google)
It's not a bad gas station, but 20 years later they're still letting cars in the wrong way, causing cars to wait on the wrong side of the road during rush hour. And to top it off, they charge for an essential and safety service like inflating tires! It's a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmMTZpSFRnEAE
